findings.blocker: CRITICAL: even after the iter-193 plan-phase refactor added `hlp : ∃ Y, order Y (algebraMap K K(C) t) = 1`, the signature is STILL mathematically false. New counter-witness: K = K(C) = k̄(u), algebraMap = id, t = u(u-1). Then `algebraMap _ _ t ≠ 0` and `order_{{u=0}} t = 1` (so `hlp` holds), yet `positivePart(principal t) = [{u=0}] + [{u=1}]` has degree 2 while `Module.finrank K K(C) = 1`. The hypothesis captures `some` order-1 zero, not `unique` order-1 zero. Prover recommends Option 3 (restrict K to single-variable polynomial / function-field-of-ℙ¹ shape).
